title: Wonder Wheels The Original Alloy Wheel Cleaner 600ml - Cleans Car Dirt Grease Brake Dust Instantly - Acid Free - Tire Cleaning Spray Washing
features: POWERFUL CLEANING FORMULA: The original wheel cleaner effortlessly cuts through dirt, grease, and stubborn brake dust, restoring your wheels to their original showroom shine.
VERSATILE USE: Specially formulated for use on lacquered wheels, steel wheels, and plastic rims, making it ideal for a wide variety of vehicles.
LONG-LASTING RESULTS: Leaves alloy wheels looking brand new for longer, ensuring your wheels stay clean and shiny even with regular use.
EFFICIENT TRIGGER ACTION: The powerful trigger spray allows for easy application, covering intricate areas to clean every part of your wheel.
QUICK & EFFECTIVE: With minimal effort, this wheel cleaner restores your wheels quickly, saving you time while delivering professional results.
description: From the manufacturer Wonder Wheels Original Alloy Wheel Cleaner The multiple award-winning alloy wheel cleaner. Designed to instantly cut through dirt, grease and brake dust on lacquered wheels, steel wheels and plastic wheel trims, Wonder Wheels Original Alloy Wheel Cleaner is specially formulated to give outstanding results and return alloy wheels to their showroom shine. Step 1 Spray Wonder Wheels Original liberally over the surface of the wheel, working on one wheel at a time. Step 2 Agitate to a foam using your favourite alloy wheel brush. Step 3 Rinse with plenty of water.
